# Copilot Instructions

## Repository Overview

This is a minimal Python project containing a single `hello.py` script.

- **Primary language:** Python 3
- **Entry point:** `hello.py`

## Commands

| Task        | Command               | Notes                          |
|-------------|----------------------|--------------------------------|
| Run         | `python3 hello.py`   | Prints "Hello World"           |
| Install     | N/A                  | No dependencies                |
| Test        | N/A                  | No test framework configured   |
| Lint        | N/A                  | No linter configured           |
| Format      | N/A                  | No formatter configured        |
| Typecheck   | N/A                  | No type checker configured     |
| CI          | N/A                  | No CI workflows configured     |

## Conventions

- Python 3 only; use `python3` (not `python`) on the command line.
- Functions should have type annotations and docstrings.
- The `greet(name)` function in `hello.py` is the core reusable unit; `__main__` simply calls it.
